page_data_script:
test = frappe.session.user

#test = "1hmdzabu@gmail.com"

usr = frappe.get_doc("Registration",{"mail":test})

if usr.mail == usr.student:
    frappe.msgprint("Dear Student")
    data.usr_type = [frappe.get_doc("Student Registration",{"student_email":test})]
else:
    frappe.msgprint("Dear Parent")
    data.usr_type = [frappe.get_doc("Student Registration",{"parent_email":test})]
    #data.usr_type =[usr]





usr = frappe.get_doc("Registration",{"mail":test})
tx_ref = usr.tx_ref

# Verify payment with Chapa
endpoint = f"https://api.chapa.co/v1/transaction/verify/{tx_ref}"
secret = frappe.get_doc("Chapa Settings").get_password("secret_key")
headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {secret}'}


response = frappe.make_get_request(endpoint, headers=headers)
#print(response.get("status"))
    #response.raise_for_status()  # Raise error for HTTP failures
#except Exception as e:
    #frappe.log_error(f"Chapa API Error: {str(e)}")
    #frappe.throw("Payment verification failed. Please try again later.")

# Parse and validate response
if response.get("status") == "success":
    payment_data = response.get("data", {})
    
    if payment_data.get("status") == "success":
        # Update registration document
        reg_doc = frappe.get_doc("Student Registration", tx_ref)
        
        # Update payment details
        reg_doc.db_set({
            "State": "Paid"
            #"amount_paid": payment_data.get("amount"),
            #"payment_reference": payment_data.get("reference"),
            #"payment_date": payment_data.get("created_at"),
            #"chapa_response": frappe.as_json(response)  # Store full response for reference
        })
        
        frappe.db.commit()
        
       
            
       
        batch = frappe.new_doc("LMS Batch Enrollment")
        batch.member = usr.student
        batch.batch = reg_doc.grade
        batch.save(ignore_permissions=True)
       
    
        frappe.msgprint("Payment verified successfully!")
        #student_mail = usr.student
        data.reg = [frappe.get_doc("Student Registration", tx_ref)]
    else:
        frappe.msgprint(f"Payment failed: {payment_data.get('status')}")
else:
    frappe.msgprint(f"Verification failed: {response.get('message')}")

page_data_script:
# Data Script for Gobez Portal - Fixed Version
#user = frappe.session.user
user ="1hmdzabu@gmail.com"

result = {"user_type": None, "data": [], "debug": {"user": user, "roles": [], "error": None}}

try:
    # Get user roles
    user_doc = frappe.get_doc("User", user)
    user_roles = [role.role for role in user_doc.roles]
    result["debug"]["roles"] = user_roles
    data.user_roles = user_roles  # Expose user roles
    
    # Check if user has Parent or LMS Student role
    if "Parent" in user_roles:
        result["user_type"] = "Parent"
        # Get all student registrations where parent_email matches current user
        registrations = frappe.get_all(
            "Student Registration",
            filters={"parent_email": user, "state": ["in", ["Paid", "Renewed"]]},
            fields=["name", "student_name", "student_email", "grade", "subscription", "state", "total"]
        )
        data.registrations = registrations  # Expose registrations
        result["debug"]["registrations_found"] = len(registrations)
        
        # Organize data by child
        children = {}
        for reg in registrations:
            if reg.student_email not in children:
                children[reg.student_email] = {
                    "student_name": reg.student_name,
                    "student_email": reg.student_email,
                    "subscriptions": []
                }
            
            # Get batch details
            batch_name = reg.grade  # Default to grade ID
            if reg.grade:
                try:
                    batch = frappe.get_doc("LMS Batch", reg.grade)
                    batch_name = batch.title
                except Exception as e:
                    batch_name = reg.grade
                    result["debug"]["batch_error"] = str(e)
            
            children[reg.student_email]["subscriptions"].append({
                "registration": reg.name,
                "batch": reg.grade,
                "batch_name": batch_name,
                "subscription": reg.subscription,
                "state": reg.state,
                "amount": reg.total
            })
        
        result["data"] = list(children.values())
        data.children = list(children.values())  # Expose children data
    
    elif "LMS Student" in user_roles:
        result["user_type"] = "LMS Student"
        # Get all student registrations where student_email matches current user
        registrations = frappe.get_all(
            "Student Registration",
            filters={"student_email": user, "state": ["in", ["Paid", "Renewed"]]},
            fields=["name", "grade", "subscription", "state", "total"]
        )
        data.registrations = registrations  # Expose registrations
        result["debug"]["registrations_found"] = len(registrations)
        
        # Get details for each registration
        subscriptions = []
        for reg in registrations:
            # Get batch details
            batch_name = reg.grade  # Default to grade ID
            courses = []
            
            if reg.grade:
                try:
                    batch = frappe.get_doc("LMS Batch", reg.grade)
                    batch_name = batch.title
                    
                    # Get courses from the Batch Course child table
                    try:
                        if batch.courses:
                            for batch_course in batch.courses:
                                course = frappe.get_doc("LMS Course", batch_course.course)
                                
                                # Get the latest progress record for this course
                                progress_records = frappe.get_all(
                                    "LMS Course Progress",
                                    filters={"member": user, "course": course.name},
                                    fields=["status"],
                                    order_by="creation desc",
                                    limit=1
                                )
                                
                                # Map status to progress percentage
                                status_to_progress = {
                                    "Complete": 100,
                                    "Partially Complete": 50,
                                    "Incomplete": 0
                                }
                                
                                progress_value = 0
                                if progress_records:
                                    status = progress_records[0].get("status", "Incomplete")
                                    progress_value = status_to_progress.get(status, 0)
                                
                                courses.append({
                                    "name": course.name,
                                    "title": course.title,
                                    "description": course.description or "",
                                    "progress": progress_value
                                })
                    except:
                        # If batch doesn't have a courses attribute, it's okay
                        pass
                except Exception as e:
                    result["debug"]["batch_error"] = str(e)
            
            subscriptions.append({
                "registration": reg.name,
                "batch": reg.grade,
                "batch_name": batch_name,
                "courses": courses,
                "subscription": reg.subscription,
                "state": reg.state,
                "amount": reg.total
            })
        
        result["data"] = subscriptions
        data.subscriptions = subscriptions  # Expose subscriptions
        
    else:
        result["debug"]["error"] = "User does not have Parent or LMS Student role"
        
except Exception as e:
    result["debug"]["error"] = str(e)

# Expose the final result
data.result = result

# Return the result for the data script
result

page_data_script:
# Data Script for Gobez Portal - Enhanced with Analytics  
#user = frappe.session.user 
user = "1hmdzabu@gmail.com"

result = {
    "user_type": None, 
    "data": [],
    "analytics": {
        "total_courses": 0,
        "completed_courses": 0,
        "in_progress_courses": 0,
        "not_started_courses": 0,
        "overall_progress": 0,
        "recent_activity": []
    },
    "achievements": [],
    "certificates": [],
    "debug": {"user": user, "roles": [], "error": None}
}

try:
    # Get user roles
    user_doc = frappe.get_doc("User", user)
    data.profile = user_doc.first_name
    user_roles = [role.role for role in user_doc.roles]
    result["debug"]["roles"] = user_roles
    data.user_roles = user_roles  # Expose user roles
    
    # Check if user has Parent or LMS Student role
    if "Parent" in user_roles:
        result["user_type"] = "Parent"
        # Get all student registrations where parent_email matches current user
        registrations = frappe.get_all(
            "Student Registration",
            filters={"parent_email": user, "state": ["in", ["Paid", "Renewed"]]},
            fields=["name","parent_name", "student_name", "student_email", "grade", "subscription", "state", "total"]
        )
        data.registrations = registrations  # Expose registrations
        result["debug"]["registrations_found"] = len(registrations)
        
        # Organize data by child
        children = {}
        for reg in registrations:
            if reg.student_email not in children:
                children[reg.student_email] = {
                    "student_name": reg.student_name,
                    "student_email": reg.student_email,
                    "subscriptions": [],
                    "analytics": {
                        "total_courses": 0,
                        "completed_courses": 0,
                        "in_progress_courses": 0,
                        "not_started_courses": 0,
                        "overall_progress": 0
                    }
                }
            
            # Get batch details
            batch_name = reg.grade  # Default to grade ID
            courses = []
            
            if reg.grade:
                try:
                    batch = frappe.get_doc("LMS Batch", reg.grade)
                    batch_name = batch.title
                    
                    # Get courses from the Batch Course child table
                    try:
                        if batch.courses:
                            for batch_course in batch.courses:
                                course = frappe.get_doc("LMS Course", batch_course.course)
                                
                                # Get the latest progress record for this course
                                progress_records = frappe.get_all(
                                    "LMS Course Progress",
                                    filters={"member": user, "course": course.name},
                                    fields=["status"],
                                    order_by="creation desc",
                                    limit=1
                                )
                                
                                # Map status to progress percentage
                                status_to_progress = {
                                    "Complete": 100,
                                    "Partially Complete": 50,
                                    "Incomplete": 0
                                }
                                
                                progress_value = 0
                                if progress_records:
                                    status = progress_records[0].get("status", "Incomplete")
                                    progress_value = status_to_progress.get(status, 0)
                                
                                # Update analytics (without augmented assignment)
                                child_analytics = children[reg.student_email]["analytics"]
                                child_analytics["total_courses"] = child_analytics["total_courses"] + 1
                                if progress_value == 100:
                                    child_analytics["completed_courses"] = child_analytics["completed_courses"] + 1
                                elif progress_value > 0:
                                    child_analytics["in_progress_courses"] = child_analytics["in_progress_courses"] + 1
                                else:
                                    child_analytics["not_started_courses"] = child_analytics["not_started_courses"] + 1
                                
                                courses.append({
                                    "name": course.name,
                                    "title": course.title,
                                    "description": course.description or "",
                                    "progress": progress_value,
                                    "completed": progress_value == 100
                                })
                    except:
                        # If batch doesn't have a courses attribute, it's okay
                        pass
                except Exception as e:
                    result["debug"]["batch_error"] = str(e)
            
            children[reg.student_email]["subscriptions"].append({
                "registration": reg.name,
                "batch": reg.grade,
                "batch_name": batch_name,
                "courses": courses,
                "subscription": reg.subscription,
                "state": reg.state,
                "amount": reg.total
            })
        
        # Calculate overall progress for each child
        for child_email, child_data in children.items():
            total = child_data["analytics"]["total_courses"]
            if total > 0:
                completed = child_data["analytics"]["completed_courses"]
                in_progress = child_data["analytics"]["in_progress_courses"]
                # Weight completed as 100%, in progress as 50%
                child_data["analytics"]["overall_progress"] = round(((completed * 100) + (in_progress * 50)) / total)
        
        result["data"] = list(children.values())
        data.children = list(children.values())  # Expose children data
    
    elif "LMS Student" in user_roles:
        result["user_type"] = "LMS Student"
        # Get all student registrations where student_email matches current user
        registrations = frappe.get_all(
            "Student Registration",
            filters={"student_email": user, "state": ["in", ["Paid", "Renewed"]]},
            fields=["name","student_name", "grade", "subscription", "state", "total"]
        )
        data.registrations = registrations  # Expose registrations
        result["debug"]["registrations_found"] = len(registrations)
        
        # Get details for each registration
        subscriptions = []
        for reg in registrations:
            # Get batch details
            batch_name = reg.grade  # Default to grade ID
            courses = []
            
            if reg.grade:
                try:
                    batch = frappe.get_doc("LMS Batch", reg.grade)
                    batch_name = batch.title
                    
                    # Get courses from the Batch Course child table
                    try:
                        if batch.courses:
                            for batch_course in batch.courses:
                                course = frappe.get_doc("LMS Course", batch_course.course)
                                
                                # Get the latest progress record for this course
                                progress_records = frappe.get_all(
                                    "LMS Course Progress",
                                    filters={"member": user, "course": course.name},
                                    fields=["status"],
                                    order_by="creation desc",
                                    limit=1
                                )
                                
                                # Map status to progress percentage
                                status_to_progress = {
                                    "Complete": 100,
                                    "Partially Complete": 50,
                                    "Incomplete": 0
                                }
                                
                                progress_value = 0
                                if progress_records:
                                    status = progress_records[0].get("status", "Incomplete")
                                    progress_value = status_to_progress.get(status, 0)
                                
                                # Update analytics (without augmented assignment)
                                result["analytics"]["total_courses"] = result["analytics"]["total_courses"] + 1
                                if progress_value == 100:
                                    result["analytics"]["completed_courses"] = result["analytics"]["completed_courses"] + 1
                                    # Add to achievements
                                    result["achievements"].append({
                                        "course": course.name,
                                        "title": course.title,
                                        "completed_date": progress_records[0].get("creation"),
                                        "type": "course_completion"
                                    })
                                elif progress_value > 0:
                                    result["analytics"]["in_progress_courses"] = result["analytics"]["in_progress_courses"] + 1
                                else:
                                    result["analytics"]["not_started_courses"] = result["analytics"]["not_started_courses"] + 1
                                
                                courses.append({
                                    "name": course.name,
                                    "title": course.title,
                                    "description": course.description or "",
                                    "progress": progress_value,
                                    "completed": progress_value == 100
                                })
                    except:
                        # If batch doesn't have a courses attribute, it's okay
                        pass
                except Exception as e:
                    result["debug"]["batch_error"] = str(e)
            
            subscriptions.append({
                "registration": reg.name,
                "batch": reg.grade,
                "batch_name": batch_name,
                "courses": courses,
                "subscription": reg.subscription,
                "state": reg.state,
                "amount": reg.total
            })
        
        # Calculate overall progress
        total = result["analytics"]["total_courses"]
        if total > 0:
            completed = result["analytics"]["completed_courses"]
            in_progress = result["analytics"]["in_progress_courses"]
            # Weight completed as 100%, in progress as 50%
            result["analytics"]["overall_progress"] = round(((completed * 100) + (in_progress * 50)) / total)
        
        result["data"] = subscriptions
        data.subscriptions = subscriptions  # Expose subscriptions
        
        # Get recent activity
        recent_activity = frappe.get_all(
            "LMS Course Progress",
            filters={"member": user},
            fields=["course", "status", "creation"],
            order_by="creation desc",
            limit=10
        )
        
        for activity in recent_activity:
            course_title = activity.course
            try:
                course_doc = frappe.get_doc("LMS Course", activity.course)
                course_title = course_doc.title
            except:
                pass
                
            result["analytics"]["recent_activity"].append({
                "course": activity.course,
                "course_title": course_title,
                "status": activity.status,
                "date": activity.creation
            })
        
        # Check for certificates for completed courses
        # Replace the certificate checking section with this updated code:

        # Check for certificates for completed courses
        for achievement in result["achievements"]:
            # Check if certificate already exists
            try:
                certificates = frappe.get_all(
                    "LMS Certificate",
                    filters={"student": user, "course": achievement["course"]},
                    fields=["name", "issue_date", "certificate_url"]
                )
            except Exception as e:
                # If certificate_url field doesn't exist, try without it
                try:
                    certificates = frappe.get_all(
                        "LMS Certificate",
                        filters={"student": user, "course": achievement["course"]},
                        fields=["name", "issue_date"]
                    )
                    # Add empty certificate_url to each certificate
                    for cert in certificates:
                        cert["certificate_url"] = None
                except Exception as e2:
                    certificates = []
                    result["debug"]["certificate_error"] = str(e2)
            
            if certificates:
                achievement["certificate"] = certificates[0]
                result["certificates"].append(certificates[0])
            else:
                # Certificate doesn't exist yet, but course is completed
                achievement["certificate_eligible"] = True
        
    else:
        result["debug"]["error"] = "User does not have Parent or LMS Student role"
        
except Exception as e:
    result["debug"]["error"] = str(e)

# Expose the final result
data.result = result

# Return the result for the data script
result
